---
name: UI / UX Feedback
about: The app works but something feels confusing, awkward, or could look better
title: "[UI] "
labels: ui-feedback, beta-feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Page / Feature

Which page or feature are you giving feedback on?

e.g. `/store-builder`, the Cart page, the product search bar

## What Felt Confusing or Awkward

Describe what you experienced and why it felt off.

## What You Expected

What behaviour or layout would have felt more natural?

## Screenshot

A screenshot is very helpful here — it gives much more context than words alone.

## Device and Browser

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Device | e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15 |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 126, Safari 17 |
| Screen size | e.g. 1920×1080, 390×844 |

## Language Preference

- [ ] I use the app in Bangla (বাংলা)
- [ ] I use the app in English

## Priority (your opinion)

- [ ] High — really affects usability
- [ ] Medium — annoying but I can work around it
- [ ] Low — nice to have
